title: Xylopleurum tetrapterum
taxonomy: Xylopleurum tetrapterum is classified within the family Rutaceae, which is commonly known as the rue or citrus family. This family includes a diverse range of plants, including citrus fruits and herbs such as rue and savory. Xylopleurum tetrapterum is native to Western Australia, where it can be found growing in a variety of habitats. The classification of Xylopleurum tetrapterum is further refined within the subfamily Zanthoxyloideae. At the genus level, Xylopleurum tetrapterum is the only species, making it a monotypic genus within the Rutaceae family.
